rooms.label: 6c
rooms.name: Uktarl's Room

monsters.name: Bandit Captain
monsters.note: Uktarl; cowardly, retreats to 7

rooms.gm_note: Card game with marked deck. Dwarf-mountain fresco hides a stone key (DC 13 Perception) that opens the box in 14b. Coins on the table.

rooms.label: 6a
rooms.name: Hall of Three Lords
rooms.gm_note: Rally point: if alerted, all Undertakers (captain, six bandits, two doppelgangers) gather here to extort a toll. Broken white staff wails "Thief!" when mended and held.

rooms.label: 6d
rooms.name: Sleeping Quarters

monsters.name: Bandit
monsters.note: asleep

monsters.name: Doppelganger
monsters.note: keeping watch

rooms.gm_note: Eight bedrolls, two lanterns.

rooms.name: Grell Hideout

monsters.name: Grell
monsters.note: hidden in north and east alcoves; pursue fleeing prey

rooms.gm_note: Black bone pillars give the grells cover. No treasure.

rooms.label: 6b
rooms.name: Rigged Secret Door
rooms.gm_note: Stacked plates crash when the door opens, alerting bandits in 6a, 6c, 6d.

rooms.name: With Sword in Hand
rooms.gm_note: Cursed glowing longsword in a stand (wielder cannot drop it). Ceiling vents carry distorted Waterdeep voices; Tiny creatures could escape through them.

rooms.name: Entrywell
rooms.gm_note: Rope drop from the Yawning Portal. A bandit watches through a secret spy-hole and retreats to warn area 6 when intruders arrive.

rooms.name: Empty Room
rooms.gm_note: Torch stubs and empty potion bottles; adventurers rest here.

rooms.label: 2a
rooms.name: Demon Reliefs
rooms.gm_note: Thirteen demon bas-reliefs. Kenku skeleton points at the nalfeshnee (secret door to 3). Dretch relief hides a second secret door to 4 with spy-hole eyes.

rooms.label: 2b
rooms.name: Pillar Forest

monsters.name: Bugbear
monsters.note: each hosts an intellect devourer; cannot be surprised; flee south to warn area 23

rooms.gm_note: Bugbears hide behind pillars and withdraw to alert Worg’s Eye. Harmless snake skeleton on north pillar; looted secret compartment in south pillar.

rooms.name: Hall of Mirrors

monsters.name: Shadow
monsters.note: construct duplicates; spawn when someone passes the two westernmost mirrors; vanish after 1 minute

rooms.gm_note: Sixteen niche mirrors, five magical. Three illusory mirrors hide shelves; one holds the bronze Halaster mask (50 gp) — the key to area 27.

rooms.label: 23a
rooms.name: Nimraith's Fate

monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.note: bored, playing games

rooms.gm_note: Part of Worg’s Eye watch post (2 bugbears + 15 goblins total; none can be surprised if warned).

rooms.label: 23b
rooms.name: Shattered Statue

monsters.name: Bugbear
monsters.note: each hosts an intellect devourer; cannot be surprised

rooms.gm_note: Bugbears reassemble a statue of three warriors (17 pieces). Devourers teleport out when a host drops.

rooms.name: Slanted Room

monsters.name: Gray Ooze
monsters.note: psychic variant; invisible underwater north of the statue

rooms.gm_note: Flooded, tilted sewer room. Sahuagin statue’s screw-off head hides a wand of secrets clue; ooze psychic-crushes anyone approaching.

rooms.label: 23c
rooms.name: Goblin Den

monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.note: asleep unless the post is alerted

rooms.gm_note: If the bugbears die, these goblins flee to 28 via 24 and 25.

rooms.label: 14c
rooms.name: Secret Room
rooms.gm_note: Empty 10-ft room.

rooms.label: 9b
rooms.name: Rotted Corpse
rooms.gm_note: Dead Undertaker (spider venom). Intact scimitar and light crossbow; empty pouch.

rooms.label: 14a
rooms.name: Sloping Tunnel
rooms.gm_note: Empty; north tunnel slopes 20 ft down to 14b.

rooms.label: 14b
rooms.name: Heart in a Box

monsters.name: Sahuagin Baron
monsters.note: petrified statue; animates only if the box is pried from its grasp (DC 20 Athletics)

rooms.gm_note: Floating acid dome falls (2d10/turn, floods 5 ft) if the box opens without the key from 6c. Lead-lined box holds the withered tiefling heart (swaps with the attuner’s heart — instant death).

rooms.label: 9a
rooms.name: Pillared Way
rooms.gm_note: Gem sockets looted; rusted animated-armor remains in the alcove.

rooms.name: Hall of Heroes
rooms.gm_note: Thirty-eight defaced statues; webbed ceiling; three dead giant spiders. Elder rune trap on the east double doors to 16.

rooms.label: 8c
rooms.name: Masters of Disguise

monsters.name: Bandit
monsters.note: disguised as vampires

rooms.gm_note: Vampire-posing extortionists; flee to 6 when outmatched. Disguise kits and rations on the table.

rooms.name: Armory
rooms.gm_note: Collapsed weapon racks; ordinary handaxe in the south door; seized sharpening wheel in the south room.

rooms.label: 8a
rooms.name: Hall of the Bone Throne
rooms.gm_note: Wyvern remains and shattered crystal prison. Throne’s serpent armrests animate and bite (poison, DC 13 Con) when someone sits or lifts the seat; hidden compartment is empty.

rooms.label: 8b
rooms.name: Harria's Room

monsters.name: Bandit Captain
monsters.note: Harria; sleeps unless disturbed, flees to 7

monsters.name: Flesh Golem
monsters.note: her guard; she cannot control it if berserk

rooms.gm_note: Clown-painted trunk holds a disguise kit and costumes.

rooms.name: Empty Room
rooms.gm_note: Empty; a good spot for a regional effect of Halaster’s lair.

rooms.name: Cubicle of Skulls
rooms.gm_note: Thousands of harmless skulls avalanche out when the door opens.

rooms.label: 7a
rooms.name: Hall of Retreat
rooms.gm_note: Undertakers’ fallback: Uktarl and Harria make a final stand here if routed. Companion: they yield rather than die; will trade dungeon info for their lives.

rooms.name: Room of Secrets
rooms.gm_note: Wear the copper helm while sitting on the copper throne: a wand of secrets drops from the ceiling.

rooms.label: 7b
rooms.name: Crypt
rooms.gm_note: Old vampire lair, long vacant. Coffin with mist-hole holds only a vial of holy water.

rooms.name: Troll's Den

monsters.name: Troll
monsters.note: charmed by Halaster: fetches meat daily from 19a for the manticores in 16

rooms.gm_note: Putrid stench forewarns. Dispel magic (DC 15) ends the charm, not the temper.

rooms.name: Manticore Den

monsters.name: Manticore
monsters.note: attack all but Halaster and the charmed troll

rooms.gm_note: Companion: the manticores speak Common — have them mock and goad, and remember they fly. Nest treasure includes a 250 gp bloodstone necklace. Scrying eye appears if the party returns later.

rooms.name: Beyond the Green Door
rooms.gm_note: Harmless green door with iron face. Empty room — or your hook into an expanded dungeon.

rooms.label: 17a
rooms.name: Foyer

monsters.name: Giant Centipede
monsters.note: inside the basilisk corpse; emerge if disturbed

rooms.gm_note: Dead basilisk on its back clutches a driftglobe (pry the claw open).

rooms.label: 19a
rooms.name: Servants' Feast Hall
rooms.gm_note: Conjured rotting meat appears on the tables at dawn; the troll from 18 feeds here daily.

rooms.label: 17b
rooms.name: Desecrated Temple

monsters.name: Black Pudding
monsters.note: 120 hp; in stasis coating the Gond statue until touched or harmed

rooms.gm_note: Eleven petrified adventurers and monsters clustered at the south end. Copper crown (75 gp) on the carrion crawler’s tentacle.

rooms.label: 19b
rooms.name: Guards' Feast Hall
rooms.gm_note: Copper tankard (25 gp) under a table.

rooms.label: 19c
rooms.name: Nobles' Feast Hall
rooms.gm_note: Door blocked by a dead dwarf burglar; her nearly complete burglar’s pack lies on a bench.

rooms.name: Hidden Demiplane (Interior)

monsters.name: Halaster Simulacrum
monsters.note: answers three questions: first a lie, then two truths; melts afterward

rooms.gm_note: Thirty-ft stone room: misty portal back, upside-down Halaster portrait. Companion: steering the party here is the level’s main goal — Halaster facetime. Tossing the mask back through lets others enter.

rooms.label: 25a
rooms.name: Dead Goblin
rooms.gm_note: Excavation site. Goblin corpse.

rooms.label: 24a
rooms.name: Old Gate
rooms.gm_note: West tunnel exits to the expanded dungeon (or uncharted depths).

rooms.name: Hidden Demiplane (Alcove)
rooms.gm_note: Bas-relief harpist with inscription. Stepping in while wearing the bronze mask from 21 transports you to the demiplane; anchoring objects are sheared off.

rooms.label: 24b
rooms.name: Dead Mage
rooms.gm_note: Remains of the tiefling wizard whose withered heart waits in 14b.

rooms.label: 25b
rooms.name: Headless Statue
rooms.gm_note: Excavation site. Decapitated statue.

rooms.label: 26b
rooms.name: Empty Closet
rooms.gm_note: Empty 10-ft room.

rooms.label: 26d
rooms.name: Mirror Gate to Level 10
rooms.gm_note: Gate of the Elder Wand: touch the mirror with a charged magic wand to open for 1 minute; 11th level required; first passage triggers an elder rune. Exits at level 10 area 8.

rooms.label: 26a
rooms.name: Hall of Many Candles
rooms.gm_note: Fifty ever-burning floating candles in 25 niches; conspicuously clean (the cube’s work). Dispel magic breaks them all.

rooms.label: 26c
rooms.name: Ooze Your Janitor?

monsters.name: Gelatinous Cube
monsters.note: just around the corner; surprises anyone with passive Perception below 15

rooms.gm_note: The cube keeps the Clean Tunnels clean.

rooms.label: 32b
rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.gm_note: The spigot still works: hot, clean water.

rooms.label: 32a
rooms.name: Empty Bedchamber
rooms.gm_note: Cave-fresco walls; empty.

rooms.label: 30a
rooms.name: Zigzagging Hall
rooms.gm_note: Anti-archer hall. The berserk air elemental charges any opened door.

rooms.name: North Dormitory
rooms.gm_note: Eleven stone shelf-beds.

rooms.name: Eye See You!
rooms.gm_note: Sixteen heraldic shields. One of Halaster’s scrying eyes studies the party, then vanishes.

rooms.label: 30b
rooms.name: Guard Room

monsters.name: Air Elemental
monsters.note: berserk and trapped; howls constantly; rushes any opened door

rooms.gm_note: Wrecked gear on the floor. Secret door west to a tunnel connecting to 31.

rooms.name: Hall of Rats

monsters.name: Wererat
monsters.note: Flyndol Greeth, sleeping as an obese giant rat on the throne; surrenders if cornered

rooms.gm_note: Two dry dwarf-face fountains in the south wall. Flyndol awaits Sylvia (31).

rooms.name: South Dormitory
rooms.gm_note: Like 33, plus an elf skeleton with serviceable hide armor and quarterstaff.

rooms.name: Delvers' Hall

monsters.name: Wererat
monsters.note: Sylvia Featherstone in giant rat form; Xanathar spy hunting secret doors; flees to 35

rooms.gm_note: Dwarf statues in alcoves; one pushed aside reveals the secret tunnel to 30b.

rooms.label: 28b
rooms.name: Obelisk of the Eye
rooms.gm_note: Goblin bunkroom around a 14-ft obelisk. First bare-handed touch: Halaster’s telepathic riddle pointing to 38/39a and the stairs to level 2.

rooms.label: 28c
rooms.name: East Chamber

monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.note: jittery, bows trained on the east tunnel; ordered to kill gricks

rooms.gm_note: Dead goblins and a dead grick on the floor. Secret door north (defenders unaware).

rooms.label: 28a
rooms.name: West Chamber

monsters.name: Bugbear
monsters.note: standing guard

rooms.gm_note: Part of Grick Snack watch post (2 bugbears + 6 goblins total).

rooms.label: 36b
rooms.name: Trapped Fellow

monsters.name: Grick
monsters.note: in the diagonal hall south

monsters.name: Spy
monsters.note: Kelim the Weasel, sealed in the west closet; weeping; treacherous if rescued

rooms.gm_note: Kelim trades a stolen spellbook (11 spells incl. lightning bolt) for rescue. Companion: he will betray anyone to save himself.

rooms.label: 36a
rooms.name: Cricks!

monsters.name: Grick
monsters.note: attack all who enter

rooms.gm_note: Partially collapsed hall strewn with skull-crushing debris.

rooms.label: 36c
rooms.name: Upside-Down Throne

monsters.name: Grick Alpha
monsters.note: gorged and sleeping; ignores anyone staying 10 ft away

rooms.gm_note: Permanent reverse gravity above 10 ft (dispel DC 18). Mummified minotaur on a ceiling throne has gem eyes (10 gp agate, 50 gp zircon).

rooms.label: 28d
rooms.name: Concealed Spiked Pit
rooms.gm_note: Floor lid over a 30-ft spiked pit (3d6 + 2d10; DC 15 Perception to spot). Dead goblin below has a lucky dwarf-thumb charm.

rooms.label: 39d
rooms.name: Old Forge

monsters.name: Ettin
monsters.note: Krung-Jung and Bokk-Nokkin, Xanathar-branded

rooms.gm_note: Dead forge hides sacks: 1,400 cp, 350 sp, and 120 iron ingots. Seven-thousand-pound rune-carved hammer hangs over the anvil.

rooms.name: Map Room

monsters.name: Revenant
monsters.note: Halleth Garke, trapped in the pit; seeks his three murderers (level 2); ally material

rooms.gm_note: Wall carving of all 23 levels with three voice-buttons (Skullport / Stardock / Halaster’s Tower gate access). Companion: Halleth is a self-expiring ally — use him. Secret door south to 38.

rooms.label: 39c
rooms.name: Goblin Hall

monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.note: starving and bickering

rooms.gm_note: A twentieth goblin lies dead — an argument gone badly.

rooms.name: Fearful Mimicry

monsters.name: Mimic
monsters.note: Large, 75 hp; poses as the south-alcove statue with a fake gold spear

rooms.gm_note: Two genuine elf-warrior statues north; rubble of the original statue behind the mimic.

rooms.name: Secret Tunnel
rooms.gm_note: Hidden curved corridor linking 37 and 39; heavy foot traffic in the dust.

rooms.label: 39b
rooms.name: Bugbear Den

monsters.name: Bugbear
monsters.note: one hosts an intellect devourer; cannot be surprised

rooms.gm_note: Part of Big Ears watch post (3 bugbears, 19 goblins, 2 ettins; a shrieker warns them).

rooms.label: 39a
rooms.name: Hall of the Two-Headed King
rooms.gm_note: Stairs descend 200 ft to level 2. Rotating the statue’s warhammer (DC 15 Perception to notice) reveals a circlet of blasting.

rooms.name: Cracked Ceiling

monsters.name: Stirge
monsters.note: roost in the ceiling fissure; descend on noise or uplifted light

rooms.gm_note: Mining tools in wheelbarrows. Bugbears hunt stirges here for food.
